ocr.text: The analysis presents data across various tissue types, including Spring bud, with 2 Biological Replicates sequenced on the
GAII platform, resulting in 5 Lanes Sequenced, yielding 97,642,336 Total Reads (Illumina Yield), with 8,880,982 No. Mapped
Reads and 9.1% Percent Mapped Reads; Autumn bud, with 1 Biological Replicate, also on GAII, had 3 Lanes Sequenced,
yielding 27,397,024 Total Reads, 10,836,547 No. Mapped Reads, and 39.6% Percent Mapped Reads; Winter bud, similarly with
1 Biological Replicate on GAII, had 3 Lanes Sequenced, resulting in 26,301,421 Total Reads, 9,734,237 No. Mapped Reads,
and 37% Percent Mapped Reads; Male catkin, with 2 Biological Replicates on GAII, achieved 5 Lanes Sequenced, 78,702,151
Total Reads, 24,870,095 No. Mapped Reads, and 31.6% Percent Mapped Reads; Female catkin, with 2 Biological Replicates on
GAII, produced 5 Lanes Sequenced, yielding 63,861,351 Total Reads, 17,212,810 No. Mapped Reads, and 27% Percent
Mapped Reads; Leaf, also with 2 Biological Replicates on GA, had 4 Lanes Sequenced, 70,264,008 Total Reads, 13,524,682
No. Mapped Reads, and 19.2% Percent Mapped Reads; Root, with 2 Biological Replicates on GA, had 5 Lanes Sequenced,
Tissue  Biological Replicates  Platform  Lanes Sequenced  Total Reads (Illumina Yield)  No. Mapped Reads  Percent Mapped Reads
Female catkin  2  GAII  5  63,861,351  17,212,810  27
Mapped Reads, and 11.5% Percent Mapped Reads; Phloem, with 2 Biological Replicates on GAII, achieved 4 Lanes
Sequenced, yielding 38,358,479 Total Reads, 22,737,382 No. Mapped Reads, and 59.3% Percent Mapped Reads; Xylem, with 1
Biological Replicate on GAII, had 5 Lanes Sequenced, resulting in 33,649,277 Total Reads, 12,278,525 No. Mapped Reads, and
36.5% Percent Mapped Reads; and the overall Totals for all tissues showed 39 Lanes Sequenced, 517,193,790 Total Reads,
129,360,151 No. Mapped Reads, with Percent Mapped Reads not specified.
